slides.title: Beat the *3pm crash*.
slides.sub: That afternoon slump isn't normal — and it's not about caffeine. Here's the real fix.

slides.title: Blood sugar spikes
slides.body: A carb-heavy lunch *spikes then crashes* your blood sugar — and your energy crashes with it.

slides.title: Add protein to lunch
slides.body: *Protein and fiber* slow the spike, so your energy stays level into the afternoon.

slides.title: Take a 10-minute walk
slides.body: A short walk after eating *blunts the spike* and wakes you up better than coffee.

slides.title: You might be thirsty
slides.body: Mild dehydration reads as *fatigue and fog*. A glass of water often fixes the dip.

slides.title: It starts with sleep
slides.body: Short sleep makes the crash *hit harder*. The afternoon slump often begins the night before.

slides.title: Steady energy, *all day*.
slides.body: Vibe Health ties your food, water & sleep to how you feel — so you can see what's draining you.

caption:
That 3pm slump isn't a caffeine problem — it's a blood-sugar one. ☕️

Anchor lunch with protein, walk for 10 minutes, drink water, and protect your sleep. Save this for tomorrow afternoon. 🔖

Vibe Health ties your food, water & sleep to how you actually feel → link in bio.
youtube_title: How to Beat the 3PM Energy Crash
